properties.address: Modern Penthouse, Playa de Las Américas

faqs.question: Can non-residents get a mortgage in Spain?
faqs.answer: Yes. Non-residents can typically finance up to 60-70% of the property's valuation or purchase price, while Spanish residents can access up to 80%.

faqs.question: How long does the mortgage process usually take?
faqs.answer: On average, the formal approval and processing take between 4 to 6 weeks once all required documentation is submitted to the bank.

sections.headline: Redefining Tenerife Real Estate
content: Certified real estate advisor in Commercial Management and Sales from the prestigious EAE Business School, and accredited as a Real Estate Agent (API), with the required qualifications to operate in Spain, including Catalonia, the Balearic Islands, and Valencia, within the corresponding real estate registries.
